Home › Services
What We Offer

Services Designed Around You, Not Your Insurance

Everything at Forward Family Medicine starts with a membership that gives you unlimited access to your doctor — with time, attention, and a care plan built around your actual life.

Primary Service

Direct Primary Care

Direct Primary Care is a membership model where you pay a flat monthly fee directly to your doctor — no insurance involvement, no surprise bills. What you get in return is the kind of care that used to define what medicine was about: a doctor who knows you, has time for you, and is genuinely available when you need them.

At Forward Family Medicine, your DPC membership means unlimited primary care with no copay, same-day appointments, and direct access to your doctor via phone, text, or email. Not through a nurse line. Your doctor.

What's Included

  • Unlimited office visits — no copay, no per-visit fees
  • Same-day and next-day appointments
  • New patient visits: 2 hours | Follow-up visits: 1 hour
  • Direct access to your doctor: phone, text, and email
  • Preventive care and annual wellness exams
  • Chronic disease management (diabetes, hypertension, thyroid, etc.)
  • Minor in-office procedures
  • Wholesale lab and medication pricing
  • Telehealth visits included
  • Specialist referral coordination
  • Integrated Lifestyle Medicine (with Dr. Lieberman)
Important: DPC membership is not insurance. It covers your day-to-day primary care. We recommend pairing it with a high-deductible health plan or health sharing plan for hospitalizations, surgeries, and specialist care.
See Membership Options Schedule a Free Meet & Greet

Why DPC Changes Everything

7 min Average traditional appointment
2 hrs New patient FFM appointment
1 hr Follow-up FFM appointment
2,000+ Patients per doctor in traditional care
~250 Patients per physician at FFM

Lifestyle Medicine Included

Every DPC membership includes access to Dr. Lieberman's board-certified Lifestyle Medicine practice. Nutrition, movement, sleep, and stress — treated as medicine.

Learn More →
Our Differentiator

Lifestyle Medicine

Forward Family Medicine is the only DPC practice on the Main Line offering in-person, board-certified Lifestyle Medicine. Dr. Lieberman is dual board-certified in Family Medicine and Lifestyle Medicine, with pre-medical training in culinary arts and nutrition science.

Lifestyle medicine treats chronic disease at its root — through evidence-based changes in nutrition, physical activity, sleep, stress management, and social connection. At FFM, it's not a handout at the end of your visit. It's integrated into how we practice.

View Full Lifestyle Medicine Page →
  • Comprehensive lifestyle assessment
  • Personalized nutrition guidance — culinary-informed, practical
  • Physical activity planning
  • Sleep optimization protocols
  • Stress and mental wellness support
  • Evidence-based protocols for diabetes, hypertension, heart health, obesity
  • Ongoing accountability built into your membership
Premium Care

Concierge Medicine

For patients who want the highest level of personalized, proactive care, our Concierge membership builds everything included in DPC with additional priority access, enhanced coordination, and comprehensive annual care.

Your concierge membership means your doctor is not just available — they're proactively monitoring your health, coordinating your specialist relationships, and ensuring nothing falls through the cracks.

Ask About Concierge →

Concierge Includes Everything in DPC, Plus:

  • Priority same-day scheduling, always guaranteed
  • Extended appointment times
  • Annual comprehensive executive wellness exam
  • Proactive health monitoring and check-ins
  • Enhanced specialist coordination
  • Travel medicine and remote consultation
FAQ

Questions About Our Services

No. Our DPC membership covers your primary care needs directly — no insurance required. We recommend pairing it with a high-deductible health plan or health sharing plan for hospitalizations and specialist care.

Unlimited office visits with no copay, same-day and next-day appointments, new patient visits up to 2 hours and follow-up visits up to 1 hour, direct phone/text/email access to your doctor, preventive care, chronic disease management, minor in-office procedures, wholesale lab pricing, telehealth, and specialist referral coordination.

Lifestyle medicine is fully integrated into Dr. Lieberman's practice — not a separate fee or add-on. It's part of what your membership covers.

Our Concierge membership builds on DPC with priority same-day scheduling always guaranteed, extended appointment times, annual comprehensive executive wellness exams, enhanced specialist coordination, and travel medicine consultation.

Ready for a Different Kind of Doctor?

Start with a free, no-obligation meet and greet. Meet the team, see the office, and ask every question you have. No pressure. No commitment.

Schedule My Free Meet & Greet

The Main Line's only Direct Primary Care practice with in-person, board-certified Lifestyle Medicine.
